Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Backfill embeddings after full index via reembed job

When Ollama is unavailable on a prior run, entities are stored with a
zero-vector sentinel (embeddingModel = ''). On subsequent runs the hash
check skips unchanged files, leaving those entities unembedded. Added a
reembed step after fullIndex so real vectors are backfilled whenever
Ollama becomes available.

commit.message:
Reject wrong-carriageway spawns that cause interchange U-turn pileups

Root cause: a vehicle spawning on the opposing carriageway of a divided
highway (e.g. westbound QEW with an east-bound destination) has no
direct route — Dijkstra's only option is to exit via off-ramp, loop
through the interchange, and re-enter on the correct side.  This
off-then-back-on pattern saturates the cloverleaf loop ramps and
creates the figure-8 pileup.

Fix: after computing the route, measure the cosine angle between the
first-edge movement vector and the O→D vector.  If the vehicle's
initial heading is more than ~107° away from its destination
(cos < −0.3), the OD pair is discarded at spawn time.  No vehicle is
created, so no ramp is ever loaded with wrong-way traffic.

Applies to all road types (not just motorways) whenever euclidean
O→D distance > 200 m.

163 passed, 1 skipped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
universal PathwaySolver: all 13 GE categories, 71/71 tests passing

- pathways.py: rewrote with Pathway/PathwayResult/SolveResult dataclasses
  and PathwaySolver class. Handles alternative routes for every category:
  - LoL (Quantitative): 3 pathways — Math / Stats / CS
  - Life Sciences: 3 pathways — Biology / Human Bio / Nutrition
  - Physical Sciences: 3 pathways — Chemistry / Physics / Geology
  - AWOC: 2 pathways — Writing / Oral Communication
  - Religion: credit-gated (14cr), dept_prefix matches any REL course
  - SBS: 6 pathways, ECON/POLI→AmCiv bonus, ANTHR→Global bonus
  - Global: 8 pathways with cascading also_satisfies bonuses
  Solver cascades also_satisfies across all categories in a stable fixed-point
  loop; prefers pathways that cover multiple remaining requirements
- optimizer.py: unified _resolve_requirements() uses PathwaySolver directly;
  prunes completed categories from course tags before ILP runs; injects
  __pathway_<cat> boost tags for partial completions (no constraint distortion)
- test_pathways.py: 71 tests covering all 13 GE categories + cross-category
  optimizer behaviour (redundant coverage, partial detection, baseline minimality)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: replace single-canvas whiteboard with three-layer SVG/HTML architecture (#438)

- Add BackgroundLayer (SVG dot grid), MiddleLayer (HTML per-object canvases/divs),

- Each stroke/shape renders as its own canvas at screen resolution; text as HTML div
- Edges rendered as SVG paths with arrowheads in overlay layer
- Selection handles and marquee box rendered as SVG elements
- NoteOverlay handles its own positioning and selection UI in HTML
- Fix multi-object drag: selectedObjectIds no longer collapses before startDragging;
  updateDrag uses dragStartPositions keys to avoid stale closure issues
- Add edge selection: edges included in marquee selection, click-selectable,

commit.message:
fix: add 5s timeout to getAuthHeaders to prevent infinite hang

supabase.auth.getSession() can hang indefinitely when the auth session
is in a broken state (10s safety timeout). Adding a race with a 5s
timeout ensures the app never freezes — instead it falls through to
the 401 retry logic and redirects to login if needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add save-state IPS re-apply fix and Dimble Woods test infrastructure

Key fix: IPS patches are now re-applied after save state loading.
Save states serialize full memory including code segment, which
overwrites IPS patches applied at ROM load time. The emulator now
re-reads the IPS file and re-patches code memory after LoadState,
then invalidates the JIT cache so patched code gets recompiled.

Verified: 60fps maintained after save state load (was dropping to
30fps before this fix).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix macOS CGEventPost silent drop: use explicit event source + inter-event delays

The log showed Cmd+C/A events created and posted successfully but having
zero effect (clipboard always empty). Root cause: passing NULL event source
to CGEventCreateKeyboardEvent can be silently blocked by macOS TCC even
when AXIsProcessTrusted() and CGPreflightPostEventAccess() both return true.

Fix: create an explicit CGEventSource with kCGEventSourceStateCombinedSessionState
and add 2ms delays between CGEventPost calls so the target app's run loop
processes each event.

Also: flush Windows icon cache in install.ps1 (ie4uinit -show) to fix
stale cached icons after exe replacement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: code audit + v1.0.0 release prep

Code audit fixes (13 issues):
- Fix #1: InputSimulator moved to dedicated std::thread — enigo now
  runs off the tokio executor, actual input simulation works correctly
- Fix #2: Relative mouse movement — server sends deltas, client uses
  Coordinate::Rel; eliminates screen-resolution mismatch between machines
- Fix #3: ScrollLock toggles input forwarding on server (switch mechanism);
  UI toggle button shares the same Arc<AtomicBool>
- Fix #4: Counter-window resync in UDP receiver — tries up to 64 counters
  ahead before dropping; survives packet loss without permanent desync
- Fix #5: client_count tracked via Arc<AtomicUsize> shared with server task;
  increments/decrements correctly on connect/disconnect
- Fix #6: Cleaner server shutdown — capture handle dropped before server
  handle; TCP keep-alive loop exits on EOF or error
- Fix #7: Bounded mpsc channel (512 cap) + try_send in capture thread —
  drops events under load instead of growing unbounded
- Fix #8: Session code normalized to uppercase in server handshake and
  validate_code_format; case-insensitive matching
- Fix #10: Extended key mappings — punctuation (-, =, [, ]) now simulate
  correctly; Unknown keys filtered silently instead of erroring
- Fix #12: panic = "unwind" in release, strip = false — preserves stack
  traces for crash diagnosis
- Fix #13: Simulator init errors propagated via status channel to UI

Version bump: 0.1.0 → 1.0.0

Docs: LICENSE (MIT), README.md, CHANGELOG.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, SECURITY.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Session 163: Fix standings data destruction + dashboard accuracy

Root cause: processStandings archive-before-upsert (Session 150b) archived ALL
standings for leagues being processed, then only restored teams that resolved
successfully. Teams that failed resolution lost their standings permanently.
Result: 77,400 of 78,600 current-season standings were archived (invisible).

Fixes:
- processStandings.cjs: Remove archive-before-upsert (Step 7b). The ON CONFLICT
  upsert already handles updates and sets archived_at = NULL on fresh data.
- generateDashboard.cjs: Use JOIN seasons WHERE is_current for standings count
  instead of archived_at IS NULL (semantically correct, archive-independent).
- universalAnalytics.cjs: Same fix for standings alignment + per-platform queries.

DB action taken: UPDATE league_standings SET archived_at = NULL for all
current-season rows (98,816 rows restored).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Add community landing page for digital newcomer intake (#30)

* feat: Add community landing page for digital newcomer intake

Digitizes the physical "gold card" intake form into a public web page at
/c/[slug]. Newcomers fill out name, phone, email and community-configured
custom fields. Submission creates/finds a user, joins them to the community
and announcement group, sets custom field values on their follow-up record,
generates a notes summary, and runs automation rules (e.g., auto-assign
based on field values).

Key changes:
- Schema: Add communityLandingPages table, expand customBool slots to 10
- Backend: Public getBySlug query, submitForm action with full intake flow,
  admin getConfig/saveConfig for form and automation rule management
- UI: Public landing page at /c/[slug] with dynamic form rendering,
  admin "Landing" tab in AdminScreen with field and rule editors
- Routing: Catch-all redirect from Vite web app, domain config helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix security and data mutation bugs in community landing page

- Remove auth token generation from public submitForm endpoint to prevent
  unauthorized token issuance for existing users (security fix)
- Use array spread before .sort() to avoid mutating Convex query cache and
  React state directly in CommunityLandingPageClient and LandingPageContent
- Preserve assigneeUserId field when loading/saving automation rules in admin
  UI to prevent data loss and unnecessary user lookups

* fix: Address Bugbot review — sorted index mismatch and missing followup record

- Use original array index for edit/delete in admin field list (sorted
  copy was causing wrong-field targeting)
- Always call setCustomFieldsAndNotes even without custom fields so
  followup record, notes summary, and automation rules are created

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix empty number fields causing schema validation error

When an optional number field is left empty, the form was sending an
empty string instead of undefined. Since the Convex schema expects
v.optional(v.number()) for customNum fields, this caused a validation
error.

The fix adds explicit handling for number fields to return undefined
(which is valid for optional number fields) instead of an empty string.

* fix: Coerce empty number fields to 0 instead of empty string

Prevents schema validation errors when optional number custom fields
are left empty on the landing page form.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Remove unnecessary "use node" directive from submitForm action

JWT token generation was removed in a previous fix, so the Node.js
runtime is no longer needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Use nullish coalescing for notes summary to preserve zero values

String(0 || "") produces "" — use ?? instead of || so numeric zero
values are correctly included in the notes summary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix community landing page security and quality issues

- Remove unnecessary 'use node' directive and stale JWT comment (no Node.js-specific code used)
- Add rate limiting (5 submissions/hour per phone) to prevent spam abuse
- Add server-side input validation for phone, firstName, and lastName
- Fix automation rules to use first-match-wins semantics instead of last-match-wins

* Fix redirect loop and automation rule matching bugs

- Use window.location.replace() instead of href to avoid back-button redirect loop
- Return false for not_equals/contains operators when condition.value is undefined/empty

* Fix slot-type compatibility bugs in landing page form fields

Bug 1: Field type change doesn't reset incompatible slot selection
- Reset slot to empty when type changes to incompatible type in FieldEditorModal
- Add server-side validation in saveConfig to ensure slot prefix matches field type

Bug 2: Required boolean fields bypass validation when unchecked
- For required boolean fields, validation now requires value to be true (checked)

* Fix bugs in landing page form submission

Bug 1: Notes generation now respects includeInNotes field
- Pass includeInNotes from client to server in customFields array
- Update submitForm action and setCustomFieldsAndNotes mutation args
- Filter by includeInNotes in notes generation loop

Bug 2: Optional fields no longer overwrite with default values
- Filter out optional fields with empty/default values before submission
- Only send required fields and optional fields user actually filled in

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: Cursor Agent <cursoragent@cursor.com>

commit.message:
Fix coordinate extraction and regenerate all manifests

FINAL file stores geocoded data as per-document (02_geocoded_metadata/{uuid})
rather than a single dict. Script was missing all 179 geocoded entries.
106/181 works now have coordinates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix UpsertSeite/UpsertBereich returning id=0 on conflict

modernc.org/sqlite's LastInsertId() returns 0 (not an error) when
ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE fires. This caused all bereiche and inhalte
to be stored with seite_id=0 on re-sync, making search return no
results for previously synced pages.
